query: SELECT a.estimated_cost, a.estimated_parts_cost, a.estimated_labor_cost, c.claim_number FROM ai_assessments a JOIN claims c ON a.claim_id = c.id WHERE c.claim_number LIKE '%2640001%' ORDER BY a.id DESC LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute SELECT a.estimated_cost, a.estimated_parts_cost, a.estimated_labor_cost, c.claim_number FROM ai_assessments a JOIN claims c ON a.claim_id = c.id WHERE c.claim_number LIKE '%2640001%' ORDER BY a.id DESC LIMIT 1;
